name: Coronet Corporation Limited
notes:
We are one of the largest Internet Infrastructure providers in Bangladesh, operating as a IIG (AS149765) and a nationwide retail ISP (AS138640). Currently, we serve more than 3 Tbps of live traffic capacity on a regular basis across the country.

We maintain extensive peering connectivity with leading global CDN and content providers, and have a strong presence at major international Internet Exchanges, including Equinix SG1 (Singapore), Equinix Mumbai, STT Kolkata-1, Sify Technology Data Center, Noida,Delhi.

Our objective is to peer with all major content and cloud providers to further enhance end-user experience, reduce latency, improve content delivery performance, and ensure stable, high-quality internet services for our valued customers across Bangladesh.

We strongly believe that open and direct peering partnerships create mutual benefits and support the continued growth of the regional internet ecosystem.
